title: Horse Debug Info
description: Show Speed / Jump / Max health of horses !
body:
When you open the debug overlay (F3) while looking at your horse you get this:

![demo](https://i.imgur.com/nA2d3y0.png)

All you need to know about your little baby can be seen now.

(In 1.2.1+ version)

You can get a 3d overlay of the stats, the mod will mark with a star the better stats in a 64 blocks radius, a star on the top is for the best overall stats.

![demo2](https://i.imgur.com/lDgNr9H.png)

You can toggle this option by setting a key in the key binding.
